name: web_search
description: Search the web. Uses Brave Search when BRAVE_API_KEY is set, otherwise falls back to DuckDuckGo Instant Answer.

env.BRAVE_API_KEY: Brave Search API key for full web search results

count.description: Number of results to return, from 1 to 10

provider.description: Search provider. auto uses Brave when BRAVE_API_KEY is set, otherwise DuckDuckGo.

freshness.description: Freshness filter for Brave: any, past day, past week, past month, or past year.
